prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey there! I know you’ve been putting this off, but now is the moment to take that first step. Remember, every great accomplishment starts with a single action. You’ve got the strength and capability to tackle this task, and once you dive in, you’ll feel a weight lift off your shoulders. Break it down into smaller pieces if you need to—just focus on one step at a time. You’re more than capable of handling this, and the satisfaction you’ll feel when it’s done will be worth it. So take a deep breath, believe in yourself, and let’s get started! You’ve got this! 💪✨
